questions.question: Which OSI layer is responsible for IP addressing?
questions.description: The network layer handles logical addressing and routing with protocols such as IP.

questions.question: Which protocol resolves an IPv4 address to a MAC address?
questions.description: ARP maps IPv4 addresses to MAC addresses on a local network.

questions.question: Which device forwards packets between networks?
questions.description: Routers forward packets between different networks using routing tables.
